title: Cache remote actor public keys for signature verification
description: The inbox handler needs to fetch each sender's actor document to get their public key for HTTP signature verification. Without caching, every inbound activity triggers an HTTP fetch. Add an in-memory LRU cache (or SQLite table) for actor_uri → public_key_pem with a TTL (e.g. 24 hours). Invalidate on signature verification failure to handle key rotation.
close_reason: Media pipeline (MIME sniff, resize, EXIF strip, blurhash), actor key cache with TTL+invalidation, inbox signature verification, --media CLI, webhook media fetch, feed enclosure attachments, graceful shutdown
